scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:3001: cross-env PORT=3001 VITE_API_PROXY=http://localhost:3001 concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
